home.headline:
Logs → Postmortems
in under 3 seconds
home.sub: Stop writing postmortems manually. Paste logs, stacktraces or describe the incident. Our AI generates full analysis with root causes, failure cascades, and SRE recommendations.
home.features_sub: Everything you need for world-class postmortems
home.personas_sub: Ideal for teams that want to improve their incident response
home.training_sub: Generate realistic incidents for SRE drills. Prepare your team with no real risk.
home.cta_sub: Start now. No signup required. Analyze your first incident in 30 seconds.
home.footer_note: Postmortem.ai → Automated AI analysis. Inspired by the Google SRE Book.
home.analyzing: Analyzing your incident with AI... (~3 seconds)

features.title: Analysis in <3s
features.desc: AI analyzes logs and generates structured postmortems in seconds with no manual intervention

features.title: Precise Root Causes
features.desc: Detects failure cascades, distinguishes symptoms from initial triggers, identifies patterns

features.title: Save 4h+/Incident
features.desc: Automates tedious analysis. From 4 hours of manual writing → 30 seconds

features.title: Export to PDF/Markdown
features.desc: Professional postmortems ready for stakeholders with one click

features.title: Realistic Training
features.desc: Generate simulated incidents for SRE drills. Improve crisis response

features.title: Integrated SRE Metrics
features.desc: p95/p99 latency recommendations, error rates, and automatic alerts

personas.title: SRE Engineers
personas.desc: Reduce your post-incident reviews from 4 hours to 30 minutes. Focus on improvements, not writing.

personas.title: Team Leads
personas.desc: Keep a complete incident record. Identify failure patterns and recurring root causes.

personas.title: DevOps/Infra
personas.desc: Train your team with realistic incidents. Improve MTTR in real events.

personas.title: Startups
personas.desc: No dedicated SREs? Postmortem.ai replaces expensive expertise with AI.
